column1: # Nano Sweep 08 — Loop-gate fork at different gate positions (2026-04-21)
# After s07 validates fork mechanism works, s08 tests: does the fork's answer depend
# on WHERE in training we fork? Probes at frac=0.25, 0.35, 0.45, 0.55.
# If fork consistently says "ON" at all frac values => loops just help; static gate is fine.
# If fork says "ON" at some and "OFF" at others => dynamic gate has real value.
